tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij zdania, wstawiając wyrazy podane w nawiasach w odpowiedniej formie. Wymagana jest pełna poprawność gramatyczna i ortograficzna odpowiedzi.

items.context: _________ (walk) home from school, she noticed a stray dog _________ (sit) outside the bookshop, shivering in the rain.
I really enjoy _________ (read) historical novels, but I can never manage _________ (finish) them before the library deadline.
The teacher made us _________ (rewrite) the essay and reminded us _________ (check) for spelling mistakes.
_________ (exhaust) after the long journey, they decided _________ (stop) at the nearest hotel rather than drive on.
She admitted _________ (forget) to send the invitations and offered _________ (call) every guest personally.
There is no point in _________ (argue) about it now — we should focus on _________ (find) a solution before the deadline.
